steps.action: Confirm the ATFLIR pod is loaded and aircraft electrical power is available.
steps.voiced: Confirm ATFLIR is loaded and the jet is powered.

steps.action: FLIR Switch (Radar/Sensor Panel, right console) - STBY.
steps.voiced: FLIR Switch on the right console sensor panel — set to STBY to start pod warmup.

steps.action: On a DDI or AMPCD, open TAC page. Once pod reports STBY, set FLIR Switch - ON and confirm OPR.
steps.voiced: Open TAC on a DDI, wait for STBY, then FLIR Switch to ON and confirm OPR.
